faq_subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers! Find everything you need to know below.
faq_q1: How do I purchase an account through Merzz MLBB?
faq_a1: The process is simple: 1. Choose Account: Browse the Merzz MLBB catalog and select an MLBB account with the specifications (Rank, Skin, Win Rate) you want. 2. Checkout: Proceed to checkout and fill in your contact details. 3. Payment: Complete the payment. 4. Delivery: The account details will be sent to you via Merzz MLBB's official WhatsApp or Instagram for record-keeping and transaction security.
faq_q2: What payment methods are accepted by Merzz MLBB?
faq_a2: We accept various methods, including bank transfers and digital wallets (e-wallets). Security note: We recommend using the trusted QRIS All Payment method.
faq_q3: Does Merzz MLBB provide a warranty for the accounts sold?
faq_a3: Yes, we provide a Full Refund Guarantee under the following conditions: 30-Day Warranty: the full refund guarantee is only valid before the buyer successfully changes and secures the main Gmail/Email of the account. The warranty is void if the MLBB account is banned due to cheating or any Terms of Service (ToS) violation committed by the buyer after the account has been handed over.
faq_q4: When is Merzz MLBB Customer Service (CS) available for service and warranty claims?
faq_a4: The Merzz MLBB Customer Service (CS) team is available every day from 09:00 - 22:00 WIB. We are ready to help with payment verification, account delivery, and handling your warranty claims. Please contact us via the official channels listed.
payment_success_subtitle: Thank you! Your transaction has been received.
payment_success_desc: We are verifying your payment. Once confirmed, our team will send your Mobile Legends account details via the email.
payment_failed_desc: If your balance has been deducted but the status is still unclear, please contact our Customer Service with your payment proof and Order ID.
rules_subtitle: Follow these steps to safely purchase an MLBB account.

rules_step2_d3: Make sure it fits your preferences

rules_step3_d2: System will direct you to admin
rules_step4_desc: Contact admin via official channel for payment instructions.
rules_step5_desc: Transfer as instructed and send payment proof.
